toolbar.subtitle: Markdown publishing workbench
toolbar.copySuccessMessage: WeChat HTML copied. Paste it directly.

copy.clipboardUnsupported: Clipboard write is not supported in this browser.
copy.htmlCopied: WeChat HTML copied. Paste it directly.
copy.plainTextFallback: HTML clipboard is unavailable; copied plain text instead.

warnings.formulaNote: Formulas were converted to SVG. Avoid re-editing them in WeChat or they may break.
warnings.mermaidNote: Mermaid diagrams were converted to PNG. Do not edit diagram areas in WeChat.
warnings.externalImage: External images were detected and inlined when possible. Upload may still be required.
warnings.imageFetchFailed: Some external images could not be inlined due to CORS. Re-upload in WeChat if needed.
warnings.mermaidRasterizeFailed: Mermaid diagram could not be converted to image: {{message}}

editor.customThemeCreated: Custom theme created from current theme

export.success: Long image exported and download started.
export.unsupported: Long image export is not supported in this environment.
export.copyPermissionFailed: Copy failed. Check browser clipboard permissions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.webOnlyHint: Codex login and AI features are desktop-only. Web mode still supports writing, preview, and copy.
settings.loginHint: Authorize through the local Codex CLI. Click “Sign in to Codex” to complete OAuth in your browser.
settings.codexPathHint: Leave empty to auto-detect the local Codex CLI installation.
settings.modelConfigHint: Choose a model per AI capability. Leave empty to use Codex defaults.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Understand and generate content with local Codex
ai.desktopOnly: AI is available in the Tauri desktop app only.
ai.notLoggedIn: Codex is not signed in or the session expired. Open Settings to authorize.
ai.customStyleLabel: Custom style (for the custom style action)
ai.customStylePlaceholder: Example: product launch speech, fast-paced and inspiring
ai.coworkHint: Run AI steps in order. Each step builds on the previous result. Reorder, edit, add, or remove steps.
ai.resultEmptyHint: Results appear here after you run an AI action—no scrolling needed.

academic:structure.label: Structure content
academic:structure.description: Organize long-form content into publish-ready Markdown with headings, paragraphs, and lists.

academic:summarize.label: Summarize
academic:summarize.description: Generate an executive summary plus key bullet points while preserving core information.

academic:toc.label: Generate TOC
academic:toc.description: Build an H1–H6 table of contents and adjust heading levels as needed.

mermaid:flowchart.label: Flowchart
mermaid:flowchart.description: Convert the core flow into a Mermaid flowchart code block.

mermaid:sequence.label: Sequence diagram
mermaid:sequence.description: Convert interactions/steps into a Mermaid sequenceDiagram code block.

mermaid:mindmap.label: Mind map
mermaid:mindmap.description: Convert the knowledge structure into a Mermaid mindmap code block.

roleplay:academic.label: Academic tone
roleplay:academic.description: Rewrite the full text in an academic style.

roleplay:wechat.label: WeChat · casual tone
roleplay:wechat.description: Rewrite for WeChat with a casual, short-paragraph reading rhythm.

roleplay:xiaohongshu.label: Xiaohongshu style
roleplay:xiaohongshu.description: Rewrite the full text in a Xiaohongshu-friendly style.

roleplay:tech-evangelist.label: Tech evangelism
roleplay:tech-evangelist.description: Rewrite the full text for developer-facing tech evangelism.

roleplay:custom.label: Custom style
roleplay:custom.description: Rewrite the full text using your custom style instructions.

store.webNoLogin: Codex login is not available in the web app. Use the desktop app.
store.notLoggedInRun: Codex is not signed in or the session expired. Sign in again in Settings.
store.coworkMinSteps: Keep at least one pipeline step.

document.emptyHint: Click “New” or “Import URL” to start writing.

import.title: Import URL
import.hint: Paste any webpage URL. The app fetches HTML and converts it to Markdown, including WeChat articles and blogs.
import.invalidUrl: Enter a valid http or https URL.
